patterns.name: Mystery Meat Navigation
patterns.description: Icon-only navigation without labels or tooltips, forcing users to guess what each icon does.
patterns.fix: Add text labels or persistent tooltips to all navigation icons.

patterns.name: Infinite Scroll Without Position
patterns.description: Endless scrolling content with no way to know current position or return to a specific point.
patterns.fix: Add a scroll position indicator, back-to-top button, or pagination option.

patterns.name: Modal Overload
patterns.description: Stacking multiple modals or using modals for content that should be inline.
patterns.fix: Use inline expansion, side panels, or dedicated pages for complex flows.

patterns.name: Carousel Blindness
patterns.description: Auto-rotating carousels that users ignore because they have learned to dismiss them.
patterns.fix: Use static content displays or user-controlled galleries instead.

patterns.name: False Affordance
patterns.description: Elements styled like buttons or links that are not interactive, or interactive elements that do not look clickable.
patterns.fix: Ensure visual styling matches interactivity: buttons look clickable, static text does not.

patterns.name: Form Field Overload
patterns.description: Showing all form fields at once in a long intimidating form.
patterns.fix: Use progressive disclosure, multi-step forms, or smart defaults to reduce visible fields.

patterns.name: Notification Fatigue
patterns.description: Too many notifications, badges, and alerts competing for attention simultaneously.
patterns.fix: Prioritize notifications, batch low-priority ones, and let users control frequency.
